ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISBLANK(Start_Date__c), ISBLANK(End_Date__c), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Backlog'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'Estimate'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'Cancelled'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c,'Complete') ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must enter project dates to move the project stage from Backlog or Estimate
